REQUEST FOR ADMISSION NO. 1:
Admit that YOU terminated Plaintiff's employment on or about June 15, 2025.

REQUEST FOR ADMISSION NO. 2:
Admit that Plaintiff complained about discrimination to YOUR human resources department prior to her termination.

REQUEST FOR ADMISSION NO. 3:
Admit that no written performance improvement plan was issued to Plaintiff prior to her termination.

RFA NO. 4:
Admit that YOU did not conduct an investigation into Plaintiff's complaints of discrimination before terminating her employment.
